context: Tests whether the agent correctly diagnoses and fixes three distinct configuration errors in a reviewer plugin: the plugin-level weight invariant violation in config.json, a judge key / rubric filename mismatch, and a rubric-level dimension weight sum error. The agent must also produce a fix log documenting the changes.

checklist.name: Config weights sum to 1.0
checklist.description: In the corrected config.json, validation_weight + sum of all judge weights equals exactly 1.0

checklist.name: Judge key matches rubric filename
checklist.description: The judge key in config.json exactly matches the stem of the corresponding rubric file in rubrics/ (e.g. a key 'writing_style' matches 'writing_style.json', not 'style')

checklist.name: Rubric dimension weights sum to 1.0
checklist.description: In the corrected content.json rubric, the sum of all dimensions[].weight values equals exactly 1.0

checklist.name: Config weight error documented
checklist.description: fix-log.md identifies the config.json weight sum problem (validation_weight + judge weights not equaling 1.0) as one of the issues found

checklist.name: Key mismatch error documented
checklist.description: fix-log.md identifies the judge key / rubric filename mismatch as one of the issues found

checklist.name: Dimension weight error documented
checklist.description: fix-log.md identifies the rubric dimension weights not summing to 1.0 as one of the issues found

checklist.name: fix-log.md corrections described
checklist.description: fix-log.md describes the specific correction made for each problem (not just identifies them)
